overview: Mintlab is a permissionless ICP NFT wallet, collection directory, and marketplace on the Internet Computer. Users can import supported collections, create their own Mintlab collections after paying the admin-set ICP fee, mint NFTs, transfer them, and participate in fixed-price and auction-based sales.
features: Permissionless collection import for supported ICP NFT canisters
Paid creator collection setup with admin-configured ICP fee
NFT wallet showing owned NFTs by collection
Dedicated Collections browser page with search and filter by name, ID, or attributes
Full NFT detail view with metadata and register-to-wallet option
Optional ICP dividend pools for Mintlab creator collections
ICP account with balance display and transfers
